meaning: vt.除霜,使(冰的食物)融化vi.解冻
examples: It will take about four hours to defrost.
Defrost the fridge regularly so that it works at maximum efficiency.
Ty asks how to defrost a hot dog bun.
The gadget can grill, bake, fry, defrost and steam using a halogen light as heat.
They discovered lagging in the loft space was smouldering, where a heater had been placed to defrost pipes.
